databaseQueries.query: SELECT count(*) as aggregate FROM "products" WHERE "status" = 'active' and "stock_quantity" > 0
SELECT * FROM "products" WHERE "status" = 'active' and "stock_quantity" > 0 ORDER BY "created_at" DESC LIMIT 12 offset 0
SELECT count(*) as aggregate FROM "products" WHERE "status" = 'active' and "stock_quantity" > 0
SELECT * FROM "products" WHERE "status" = 'active' and "stock_quantity" > 0 ORDER BY "created_at" DESC LIMIT 12 offset 0
SELECT "category_id", "category_name" FROM "categories" WHERE exists (SELECT * FROM "products" WHERE "categories"."category_id" = "products"."category_id" and "status" = 'active')
SELECT "brand_id", "brand_name" FROM "brands" WHERE exists (SELECT * FROM "products" WHERE "brands"."brand_id" = "products"."brand_id" and "status" = 'active')
SELECT sum("quantity") as aggregate FROM "cart_items" WHERE "user_id" = 9
